subject: Bootstrap sales-coworker: draft outreach for cowork.subagentknowledge.com launch
body: 1) Research the three product surfaces (cowork.subagentknowledge.com, coworkers.subagentknowledge.com, subagentknowledge.com) and identify the value prop for solo founders and small teams. 2) Draft an outreach email template for enterprise prospects interested in multi-agent orchestration. Queue to cowork/apps/mail/queued_drafts.jsonl with status=queued. 3) Append estimated Neon database cost ($25/mo starter) to cowork/data/queues/finance.jsonl. Route outcome to pm-coworker.
